rows.finalText: The clearest way into "What is the next right step in my calling" is through Purpose / Calling with a right path emphasis. The sequence begins in Past with Snake (7), so a nuanced approach beats blunt force is already in play. Snake colors your calling through layered motives, complexity, desire, and the need to read around what looks obvious. In Present, Sun (31) becomes the pivot, so clarity and momentum increase quickly turns into both pressure and opportunity. Here Sun becomes concrete through confidence, visibility, success, and the warming effect of momentum that is finally obvious. Future closes with Cross (36), and the directional message is a serious theme calls for grounded reflection when the pivot receives consistent attention. In your calling, Cross often looks like the weight of calling, duty, and the difference between a meaningful burden and a draining one.
